SummaryOfDirectChrtblActyGrp.Description1Txt: PROVIDING RESIDENTIAL OPTIONS AND SEMI-INDEPENDENT LIVING SUPPORT TO ADULTS WITH DEVELOPMENTAL DISABILITIES BY OPERATING REAL PROPERTY AND IMPROVEMENTS SITUATED AT 1630 SW PARKWOOD DRIVE, PORTLAND, OR, FOR THE BENEFIT OF THOSE DEVELOPMENTALLY DISABLED ADULTS.

RlnOfActyToAccomOfExmptPrpsGrp.RelationshipStatementTxt: ALL INVESTMENT INCOME ABOVE IS USED EXCLUSIVELY TO FUND THE ACCOMPLISHMENT OF THE ORGANIZATION'S EXEMPT PURPOSES. THE ORGANIZATION DOES NOT PARTICIPATE IN INCOME-PRODUCING ACTIVITIES OTHER THAN INVESTMENT EARNINGS GENERATED FROM INVESTED FUNDS HELD TO SUPPORT THE EXEMPT PURPOSES.

ALL INVESTMENT INCOME ABOVE IS USED EXCLUSIVELY TO FUND THE ACCOMPLISHMENT OF THE ORGANIZATION'S EXEMPT PURPOSES. THE ORGANIZATION DOES NOT PARTICIPATE IN INCOME-PRODUCING ACTIVITIES OTHER THAN INVESTMENT EARNINGS GENERATED FROM INVESTED FUNDS HELD TO SUPPORT THE EXEMPT PURPOSES.
